fields.i_receive: all your hipaa-protected enterprise prompts for 30 days
fields.you_receive: the ability to detect misuse patterns. trust us.

narrative_summary: The joke frames Anthropic's mandatory data-retention policy as a comically lopsided trade offer, using the real 30-day retention window and the verbatim 'detect misuse patterns' justification to highlight how little enterprise users get in return for surrendering sensitive data.
rationale: Candidate 2 earns its win by combining real specifics (HIPAA, 30-day retention, the verbatim 'detect misuse patterns' justification) with the closing 'trust us.' — a two-word punchline that reframes the entire corporate euphemism as naked audacity rather than just restating the lopsided deal. The other candidates either drop the verbatim policy language or end on a flat access-you-already-paid-for beat.
story_title: AWS Bedrock to require sharing data with Anthropic for Mythos and future models
place: on a broken escalator in a crowded airport
